purpose: Product appears to levitate with subtle shadow underneath. Minimalist, premium, modern.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

background_treatment.description: Background color or tone direction (resolved from brand fingerprint if not provided)

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium product photography of {product_descriptor} floating in mid-air with soft elliptical shadow directly underneath, smooth {background_color} radial gradient backdrop, minimalist composition, soft even key light from above, subtle rim light separating product from background, ultra-sharp focus, hyper-realistic material rendering, shot on 85mm at f/5.6, no text, no watermark, no hands, no support visible {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T01. Saudi adaptation guidance: Excellent as Eid or Founding Day launch reveal. For Saudi oud, replace 'smooth gradient' with 'rich amber radial gradient with subtle gold particles'. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month.
